message:
Fix iOS oval globe; add CSS gradient fallback when WebGL unavailable

- Replace getBoundingClientRect() measurement (which can briefly return
  non-square values on iOS Safari during URL-bar animation, causing the
  globe to render as an oval) with Math.min(innerWidth, innerHeight, 900)
  so the canvas is always square.
- Detect WebGL availability up front; on browsers where WebGL is blocked
  (corporate-managed Macs, older versions, GPU disabled), hide the canvas
  and toggle html.no-webgl, which paints a soft Cloudflare-orange radial
  gradient via global.css so the page never feels empty.
